requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and IEC 62281; Port of Djibouti as Major BRI Regional Hub
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3和IEC 62281；吉布提港口作为重要"一带一路"地区枢纽
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3和IEC 62281；吉布地港口作為重要「一帶一路」地區樞紐

summary.en: UN 38.3 (Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods — Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) specifies eight mandatory transport safety tests (T1 Altitude Simulation, T2 Thermal Test, T3 Vibration, T4 Shock, T5 External Short Circuit, T6 Impact/Crush, T7 Overcharge, T8 Forced Discharge) for all lithium metal and lithium-ion cells and batteries, including cells, modules, and battery packs used in stationary BESS. Since January 1, 2020, a UN 38.3 Test Summary is mandatory documentation for international lithium battery shipments under IATA DGR, IMDG Code, and ADR. IEC 62281 (Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries During Transport) provides additional transport safety requirements. Djibouti is party to international transport conventions and these requirements apply universally to all lithium battery imports by sea, air, or road — there is no Djibouti-specific exemption. The Port of Djibouti (Doraleh Multipurpose Port and the older Djibouti Port) is a major regional hub and a key BRI logistics node with significant Chinese logistics presence (China Merchants Port Holdings operates the Doraleh Container Terminal). This Chinese logistics presence in Djibouti's port infrastructure is a practical advantage for BESS shipments from China, as Chinese freight forwarders and logistics providers with BRI network presence are experienced with the Djibouti port system. BESS cells and modules exported from China to Djibouti must be covered by a valid UN 38.3 Test Summary from an accredited laboratory before shipment.
summary.zh: UN 38.3（危险货物运输建议书——测试和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）规定了所有锂金属和锂离子电芯及电池——包括固定式BESS中使用的电芯、模组和电池包——须通过8项强制运输安全测试（T1高度模拟、T2热测试、T3振动、T4冲击、T5外部短路、T6冲击/挤压、T7过充电、T8强制放电）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3测试摘要是国际锂电池货物在IATA DGR、IMDG规则和ADR下的强制文件。IEC 62281（运输过程中一次和二次锂电芯及电池安全）提供了额外的运输安全要求。吉布提加入国际运输公约，这些要求普遍适用于所有经由海运、航空或公路进口的锂电池——不存在吉布提专项豁免。吉布提港口（多哈雷多功能港及旧吉布提港）是重要的地区枢纽和关键的"一带一路"物流节点，拥有显著的中国物流存在（招商局港口控股运营多哈雷集装箱码头）。吉布提港口基础设施中的中国物流存在对中国BESS货物是实际优势，因为具有"一带一路"网络存在的中国货运代理和物流提供商熟悉吉布提港口体系。从中国出口至吉布提的BESS电芯和模组须在出货前由认可实验室出具有效的UN 38.3测试摘要。
summary.zht: UN 38.3（危險貨物運輸建議書——測試和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）規定了所有鋰金屬和鋰離子電芯及電池——包括固定式BESS中使用的電芯、模組和電池包——須通過8項強制運輸安全測試（T1高度模擬、T2熱測試、T3振動、T4衝擊、T5外部短路、T6衝擊/擠壓、T7過充電、T8強制放電）。自2020年1月1日起，UN 38.3測試摘要是國際鋰電池貨物在IATA DGR、IMDG規則和ADR下的強制文件。IEC 62281（運輸過程中一次和二次鋰電芯及電池安全）提供了額外的運輸安全要求。吉布地加入國際運輸公約，這些要求普遍適用於所有經由海運、航空或公路進口的鋰電池——不存在吉布地專項豁免。吉布地港口（多哈雷多功能港及舊吉布地港）是重要的地區樞紐和關鍵的「一帶一路」物流節點，擁有顯著的中國物流存在（招商局港口控股運營多哈雷集裝箱碼頭）。吉布地港口基礎設施中的中國物流存在對中國BESS貨物是實際優勢，因為具有「一帶一路」網絡存在的中國貨運代理和物流提供商熟悉吉布地港口體系。從中國出口至吉布地的BESS電芯和模組須在出貨前由認可實驗室出具有效的UN 38.3測試摘要。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (mandatory transport safety tests T1–T8 for all lithium cells and batteries)
IEC 62281:2019 — Safety of Primary and Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries During Transport (additional transport safety requirements)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) — applies to all air freight of lithium batteries including BESS cells and modules
IMDG Code — applies to all sea freight of lithium batteries including BESS cells and modules to Port of Djibouti
UN Model Regulations, 7th revised edition (2021) — Test Summary requirement in force since January 1, 2020

summary.en: Chinese BESS cell and module manufacturers are required to comply with UN 38.3 for export shipments under international transport conventions. Chinese manufacturers typically hold UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited testing laboratories such as UL, SGS, Bureau Veritas, TÜV Rheinland, or CAICT. IEC 62281 compliance is also standard for Chinese BESS export shipments. A Chinese-origin UN 38.3 test summary from an accredited laboratory is acceptable for shipments to the Port of Djibouti — there is no Djibouti-specific exemption or additional transport requirement that overrides international conventions. The key gap is documentation scope and currency: the test summary must cover the specific cell model, chemistry, capacity, and configuration of the BESS units being shipped. China's established BRI logistics network to Djibouti (via China Merchants Port Holdings' presence at the Doraleh Container Terminal and Addis Ababa–Djibouti Railway freight connections) means there are Chinese freight forwarders experienced with this specific trade lane.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组制造商须依据国际运输公约对出口货物遵守UN 38.3。中国制造商通常持有来自CNAS认可测试实验室（如UL、SGS、必维、TÜV莱茵或CAICT）的UN 38.3测试报告和测试摘要。IEC 62281合规也是中国BESS出口货物的标准要求。来自认可实验室的中国产地UN 38.3测试摘要可用于运往吉布提港口的货物——不存在覆盖国际公约的吉布提专项豁免或额外运输要求。主要差距在于文件范围和时效性：测试摘要须涵盖所运输BESS单元的特定电芯型号、化学体系、容量和配置。中国通往吉布提的既有"一带一路"物流网络（通过招商局港口控股在多哈雷集装箱码头的存在以及亚吉铁路货运连接）意味着有中国货运代理熟悉这条特定贸易航线。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組製造商須依據國際運輸公約對出口貨物遵守UN 38.3。中國製造商通常持有來自CNAS認可測試實驗室（如UL、SGS、必維、TÜV萊茵或CAICT）的UN 38.3測試報告和測試摘要。IEC 62281合規也是中國BESS出口貨物的標準要求。來自認可實驗室的中國產地UN 38.3測試摘要可用於運往吉布地港口的貨物——不存在覆蓋國際公約的吉布地專項豁免或額外運輸要求。主要差距在於文件範圍和時效性：測試摘要須涵蓋所運輸BESS單元的特定電芯型號、化學體系、容量和配置。中國通往吉布地的既有「一帶一路」物流網絡（通過招商局港口控股在多哈雷集裝箱碼頭的存在以及亞吉鐵路貨運連接）意味著有中國貨運代理熟悉這條特定貿易航線。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test reports and test summaries from CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories (CAICT, UL China, SGS China, Bureau Veritas China, TÜV Rheinland China) — acceptable for international transport including to Djibouti if test summary covers the specific cell/battery type
IEC 62281:2019 — standard Chinese BESS export practice includes IEC 62281 transport safety compliance

gap.en: The gap is documentation scope and currency, not standard equivalence. UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 are universal requirements and Chinese-origin test summaries from accredited laboratories are accepted for Djibouti-bound shipments. The Port of Djibouti (Doraleh) is a major BRI hub with Chinese logistics presence, providing a practical logistical advantage for China-origin BESS shipments. Exporters should verify: (a) the UN 38.3 test summary covers the specific cell model (chemistry, capacity, and format) being exported — a summary for a different model is not transferable; (b) the test summary is from a currently ILAC-accredited laboratory; (c) any cell design change since the original UN 38.3 testing triggers a reassessment; (d) module and battery-pack assemblies may require separate UN 38.3 assessment; (e) engage a dangerous-goods freight forwarder with Djibouti trade-lane experience (BRI-network Chinese forwarders are well-positioned) to confirm packaging, marking, labelling, and documentation requirements for Port of Djibouti and Djibouti customs.
gap.zh: 差距在于文件范围和时效性，而非标准等效性。UN 38.3和IEC 62281是普遍要求，来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于运往吉布提的货物。吉布提港口（多哈雷）是拥有中国物流存在的重要"一带一路"枢纽，为中国产地BESS货物提供了实际物流优势。出口商应核实：（a）UN 38.3测试摘要涵盖所出口的特定电芯型号（化学体系、容量和规格）——针对不同型号的测试摘要不可转用；（b）测试摘要来自当前仍获ILAC认可的实验室；（c）自最初UN 38.3测试以来的任何电芯设计变更均触发重新评估；（d）模组和电池包组件可能需要单独进行UN 38.3评估；（e）聘请具有吉布提贸易航线经验的危险品货运代理（具有"一带一路"网络的中国货运代理处于有利地位）确认吉布提港口和吉布提海关的包装、标识、标签及文件要求。
gap.zht: 差距在於文件範圍和時效性，而非標準等效性。UN 38.3和IEC 62281是普遍要求，來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於運往吉布地的貨物。吉布地港口（多哈雷）是擁有中國物流存在的重要「一帶一路」樞紐，為中國產地BESS貨物提供了實際物流優勢。出口商應核實：（a）UN 38.3測試摘要涵蓋所出口的特定電芯型號（化學體系、容量和規格）——針對不同型號的測試摘要不可轉用；（b）測試摘要來自當前仍獲ILAC認可的實驗室；（c）自最初UN 38.3測試以來的任何電芯設計變更均觸發重新評估；（d）模組和電池包組件可能需要單獨進行UN 38.3評估；（e）聘請具有吉布地貿易航線經驗的危險品貨運代理（具有「一帶一路」網絡的中國貨運代理處於有利地位）確認吉布地港口和吉布地海關的包裝、標識、標籤及文件要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under international transport law for all lithium battery imports to Djibouti by sea, air, or road — applies universally with no Djibouti-specific exemption
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under international transport conventions for all lithium battery export shipments from China

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport compliance is universal — Chinese-origin test summaries from accredited laboratories are accepted for Djibouti shipments provided they cover the specific cell model and are current. The Port of Djibouti (Doraleh) is a major BRI logistics hub with Chinese port operator presence, offering a practical logistical advantage for China-origin BESS shipments. The primary risk is documentation scope mismatch or an outdated summary after a cell design change. Verify test summary coverage and currency before each shipment and engage a dangerous-goods freight forwarder experienced with the Djibouti trade lane.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输合规是普遍要求——来自认可实验室的中国产地测试摘要可用于吉布提货物，前提是涵盖特定电芯型号且保持最新状态。吉布提港口（多哈雷）是拥有中国港口运营商存在的重要"一带一路"物流枢纽，为中国产地BESS货物提供了实际物流优势。主要风险在于文件范围不匹配或电芯设计变更后测试摘要过期。请在每次出货前核实测试摘要的覆盖范围和时效性，并聘请具有吉布提贸易航线经验的危险品货运代理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸合規是普遍要求——來自認可實驗室的中國產地測試摘要可用於吉布地貨物，前提是涵蓋特定電芯型號且保持最新狀態。吉布地港口（多哈雷）是擁有中國港口運營商存在的重要「一帶一路」物流樞紐，為中國產地BESS貨物提供了實際物流優勢。主要風險在於文件範圍不匹配或電芯設計變更後測試摘要過期。請在每次出貨前核實測試摘要的覆蓋範圍和時效性，並聘請具有吉布地貿易航線經驗的危險品貨運代理。

requirement_topic.en: Customs and Import — Ministry of Energy Import Permit and EDD Acceptance; No Published BESS-Specific Import Standard
requirement_topic.zh: 海关与进口——能源部进口许可及EDD认可；无已公布的BESS专项进口标准
requirement_topic.zht: 海關與進口——能源部進口許可及EDD認可；無已公布的BESS專項進口標準

summary.en: Djibouti does not have a published BESS-specific import standard or product conformity scheme. There is no Djibouti equivalent of Saudi Arabia's SABER pre-shipment product registration system or Qatar's QGOSM Technical Regulations for BESS. Customs clearance at the Port of Djibouti is governed by the Djibouti Revenue Authority (Office Djiboutien des Recettes — ODR). For utility-scale BESS projects, the Ministry of Energy issues project-level import permits and approvals. EDD acceptance is required for all grid-connected BESS. In the absence of a published product conformity scheme, the practical import gateway requirements are: (1) Ministry of Energy project approval including import permit for BESS equipment; (2) standard customs documentation (commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin); (3) dangerous-goods documentation per international transport conventions (UN 38.3 test summary, IMDG compliance documentation for sea freight); (4) IEC-based product safety certificates as evidence required by the Ministry of Energy or project owner. Djibouti's free trade zone (Djibouti Free Zone and the broader Djibouti International Free Trade Zone — DIFTZ) may offer reduced import duty for BESS equipment in certain project structures — confirm with the Ministry of Energy and the DIFTZ authority.
summary.zh: 吉布提没有已公布的BESS专项进口标准或产品合格评定体系。吉布提没有等同于沙特阿拉伯SABER装运前产品注册体系或卡塔尔QGOSM BESS技术法规的机制。吉布提港口的清关由吉布提税务局（Office Djiboutien des Recettes — ODR）管辖。对于公用事业规模BESS项目，能源部在项目层面签发进口许可和批准。所有并网BESS须取得EDD认可。在没有已公布产品合格评定体系的情况下，实际进口通关要求包括：（1）能源部项目批准，包括BESS设备进口许可；（2）标准报关文件（商业发票、装箱单、提单、原产地证书）；（3）按国际运输公约要求的危险货物文件（UN 38.3测试摘要、海运IMDG合规文件）；（4）能源部或项目业主要求的IEC产品安全证书。吉布提自由贸易区（吉布提自由区及更广泛的吉布提国际自由贸易区——DIFTZ）在某些项目结构下可能为BESS设备提供减免进口税优惠——请向能源部和DIFTZ主管机构确认。
summary.zht: 吉布地沒有已公布的BESS專項進口標準或產品合格評定體系。吉布地沒有等同於沙特阿拉伯SABER裝運前產品注冊體系或卡達QGOSM BESS技術法規的機制。吉布地港口的清關由吉布地稅務局（Office Djiboutien des Recettes — ODR）管轄。對於公用事業規模BESS項目，能源部在項目層面簽發進口許可和批准。所有併網BESS須取得EDD認可。在沒有已公布產品合格評定體系的情況下，實際進口通關要求包括：（1）能源部項目批准，包括BESS設備進口許可；（2）標準報關文件（商業發票、裝箱單、提單、原產地證書）；（3）按國際運輸公約要求的危險貨物文件（UN 38.3測試摘要、海運IMDG合規文件）；（4）能源部或項目業主要求的IEC產品安全證書。吉布地自由貿易區（吉布地自由區及更廣泛的吉布地國際自由貿易區——DIFTZ）在某些項目結構下可能為BESS設備提供減免進口稅優惠——請向能源部和DIFTZ主管機構確認。

standards_or_laws: Djibouti Ministry of Energy — project import permit and approval authority for utility-scale BESS; no published BESS-specific import standard confirmed as of dataset date
Électricité de Djibouti (EDD) — utility acceptance required for all grid-connected BESS
Office Djiboutien des Recettes (ODR) — Djibouti Revenue Authority; governs customs clearance at Port of Djibouti
Djibouti International Free Trade Zone (DIFTZ) — potential reduced import duty for energy equipment in qualifying project structures; confirm eligibility with DIFTZ authority

summary.en: Chinese BESS manufacturers export under standard Chinese export documentation (export licence, commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin from China Council for Promotion of International Trade or relevant chamber of commerce) and product safety certificates (GB compliance, CQC mark where required). Chinese export procedures do not align with Djibouti's Ministry of Energy import permit process — there is no bilateral product recognition or mutual acceptance agreement between China and Djibouti for BESS equipment. Chinese origin BESS equipment exported to Djibouti must obtain Djibouti Ministry of Energy project import permits on a project-by-project basis regardless of Chinese export certification status. IEC-based product certificates (IEC 62619, IEC 62933) from internationally recognised third-party bodies are required in addition to Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 中国BESS制造商依据标准中国出口文件（出口许可、商业发票、装箱单、中国国际贸易促进委员会或相关商会原产地证书）和产品安全证书（GB合规、适用情况下的CQC标志）进行出口。中国出口程序与吉布提能源部进口许可流程不衔接——中国和吉布提之间没有BESS设备的双边产品认可或相互接受协议。出口至吉布提的中国产地BESS设备须在不考虑中国出口认证状态的情况下，逐项目向吉布提能源部申请项目进口许可。除中国GB合规外，还须提供来自国际知名第三方机构的基于IEC的产品证书（IEC 62619、IEC 62933）。
summary.zht: 中國BESS製造商依據標準中國出口文件（出口許可、商業發票、裝箱單、中國國際貿易促進委員會或相關商會原產地證書）和產品安全證書（GB合規、適用情況下的CQC標誌）進行出口。中國出口程序與吉布地能源部進口許可流程不銜接——中國和吉布地之間沒有BESS設備的雙邊產品認可或相互接受協議。出口至吉布地的中國產地BESS設備須在不考慮中國出口認證狀態的情況下，逐項目向吉布地能源部申請項目進口許可。除中國GB合規外，還須提供來自國際知名第三方機構的基於IEC的產品證書（IEC 62619、IEC 62933）。

standards_or_laws: Chinese export documentation: commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin (CCPIT or chamber of commerce), export licence — standard Chinese export practice; no special BESS export licence required for Djibouti beyond standard dangerous goods documentation
GB compliance certificates and CQC marks — not accepted as product conformity evidence in Djibouti; IEC-based third-party certificates required

gap.en: Gap: Djibouti has no published BESS-specific import standard and no product conformity pre-shipment scheme. Ministry of Energy project import permits must be obtained project by project — there is no streamlined product registration route. Chinese GB compliance certificates carry no recognition in Djibouti. Actions: (a) initiate Ministry of Energy project import permit application early — allow time for government review as timelines are not published; (b) prepare IEC-based product safety certificates (IEC 62619 for cells/modules, IEC 62933 for system level) from internationally recognised accredited bodies as the expected evidence package; (c) prepare standard dangerous-goods export documentation (UN 38.3 test summary, IMDG documentation for sea freight via Port of Djibouti); (d) confirm whether the Djibouti International Free Trade Zone (DIFTZ) can provide any import duty benefit for the BESS equipment in the project structure; (e) engage a licensed Djibouti customs agent and a freight forwarder with Djibouti port experience (BRI-network Chinese forwarders familiar with the Doraleh terminal are well-positioned) to navigate customs clearance; (f) confirm with ODR any applicable import duty rates for lithium battery BESS equipment under Djibouti's customs tariff schedule.
gap.zh: 差距：吉布提没有已公布的BESS专项进口标准，也没有产品合格评定装船前体系。能源部项目进口许可须逐项目申请——没有简化的产品注册途径。中国GB合规证书在吉布提没有认可。行动：（a）尽早启动能源部项目进口许可申请——为政府审查预留时间，因为审批周期未公布；（b）准备来自国际知名认可机构的基于IEC的产品安全证书（电芯/模组的IEC 62619、系统级的IEC 62933）作为预期证据包；（c）准备标准危险货物出口文件（UN 38.3测试摘要、经吉布提港口海运的IMDG文件）；（d）确认吉布提国际自由贸易区（DIFTZ）是否能在项目结构下为BESS设备提供任何进口关税优惠；（e）聘请持牌吉布提报关行和具有吉布提港口经验的货运代理（熟悉多哈雷码头的"一带一路"网络中国货运代理处于有利地位）处理清关；（f）向ODR确认吉布提关税表下锂电池BESS设备适用的进口税率。
gap.zht: 差距：吉布地沒有已公布的BESS專項進口標準，也沒有產品合格評定裝船前體系。能源部項目進口許可須逐項目申請——沒有簡化的產品注冊途徑。中國GB合規證書在吉布地沒有認可。行動：（a）盡早啟動能源部項目進口許可申請——為政府審查預留時間，因為審批週期未公布；（b）準備來自國際知名認可機構的基於IEC的產品安全證書（電芯/模組的IEC 62619、系統級的IEC 62933）作為預期證據包；（c）準備標準危險貨物出口文件（UN 38.3測試摘要、經吉布地港口海運的IMDG文件）；（d）確認吉布地國際自由貿易區（DIFTZ）是否能在項目結構下為BESS設備提供任何進口關稅優惠；（e）聘請持牌吉布地報關行和具有吉布地港口經驗的貨運代理（熟悉多哈雷碼頭的「一帶一路」網絡中國貨運代理處於有利地位）處理清關；（f）向ODR確認吉布地關稅表下鋰電池BESS設備適用的進口稅率。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Ministry of Energy project import permit required for utility-scale BESS; EDD acceptance required for grid-connected systems; no published BESS-specific import standard or product conformity pre-shipment scheme confirmed as of dataset date
mandatory_status.cn: Standard Chinese export documentation and dangerous-goods compliance mandatory for international lithium battery exports from China; no special BESS-specific Chinese export licence required for Djibouti beyond dangerous goods requirements

source.publisher: Office Djiboutien des Recettes (ODR) — Djibouti Revenue Authority

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Djibouti has no published BESS-specific import standard or product conformity pre-shipment scheme. Ministry of Energy project import permits must be obtained on a project-by-project basis. Chinese GB compliance certificates are not accepted as product conformity evidence — IEC-based third-party certificates (IEC 62619, IEC 62933) from internationally recognised accredited bodies are required. The Port of Djibouti (Doraleh) with its Chinese operator presence is a logistical advantage for China-origin BESS shipments. Engage a licensed Djibouti customs agent and a dangerous-goods freight forwarder with Djibouti trade-lane experience early in the project timeline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 吉布提没有已公布的BESS专项进口标准或产品合格评定装船前体系。能源部项目进口许可须逐项目申请。中国GB合规证书不被接受为产品合格证据——须提供来自国际知名认可机构的基于IEC的第三方证书（IEC 62619、IEC 62933）。吉布提港口（多哈雷）拥有中国运营商存在，为中国产地BESS货物提供了物流优势。请在项目周期早期聘请持牌吉布提报关行和具有吉布提贸易航线经验的危险品货运代理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 吉布地沒有已公布的BESS專項進口標準或產品合格評定裝船前體系。能源部項目進口許可須逐項目申請。中國GB合規證書不被接受為產品合格證據——須提供來自國際知名認可機構的基於IEC的第三方證書（IEC 62619、IEC 62933）。吉布地港口（多哈雷）擁有中國運營商存在，為中國產地BESS貨物提供了物流優勢。請在項目週期早期聘請持牌吉布地報關行和具有吉布地貿易航線經驗的危險品貨運代理。
